title: Visualisation
description: JSON schema for Gooddata Analytics Visualisation

id.description: A unique identifier of the visualisation.

title.description: An optional human readable title for the visualisation. Will be derived from id if not provided explicitly.

description.description: An optional description of the visualisation.

tags.description: A list of strings - metadata tags of this visualisation.

show_in_ai_results.description: Optional flag to indicate if the visualisation should be shown in AI results. When omitted, the visualisation is visible.

config.description: Configuration of visualisation of defined type.

metrics.description: A list of metrics in this visualisation.

view_by.description: A list of view by attributes in this visualisation.

segment_by.description: A list of segment by attributes in this visualisation.

rows.description: A list of rows attributes in this visualisation.

columns.description: A list of columns attributes in this visualisation.

view_by.description: A list of view by locations in this visualisation.

segment_by.description: A list of segment by attributes in this visualisation.

rows.description: A list of rows attributes in this visualisation.

columns.description: A list of columns attributes in this visualisation.

field.description: A field name in the report.

axis.description: Axis to use for this bucket. Only applicable for "combo" charts.

display_as.description: Chart type to use for this bucket. Only applicable for "repeater" charts.

totals.description: A list of totals in this bucket.

title.description: A total title.

using.description: Local metric identifier to use for this total.

id.description: A unique identifier of the visualization data layer.

title.description: An optional human readable title for the layer. Will be derived from id if not provided explicitly.

type.description: Type of visualisation for this layer.

config.description: Configuration of layer of defined type.

metrics.description: A list of metrics in this layer.

view_by.description: A list of view by locations in this layer.

segment_by.description: A list of segment by attributes in this layer.

view_by.description: A list of view by locations in this layer.
